problem_title: Travel Rule workflows remain disconnected and manual
problem_description: Travel Rule provider outputs often sit outside unified compliance workflows, causing delays in routing, exception handling and case management. This fragmentation makes it harder for operations teams to trace decisions and maintain consistent audit evidence for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule provider data, exception handling, case workflows and audit evidence into one operational layer so compliance teams manage routing and reviews with full traceability.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule provider outputs through exception handling, case creation, evidence preservation and compliance decision workflows for operational review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule provider outputs into structured compliance workflows, supporting message routing, status tracking, case creation, and decision logging for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes exceptions from Travel Rule messages into cases for manual review with audit logs, supporting controlled workflows for handling incomplete or high-risk transfers.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording decision logs, case history, and supporting provider data for Travel Rule events, supporting review readiness and regulatory inspection needs.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, consolidating their outputs into connected workflows without requiring changes to existing provider systems or replacing message platforms.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule message systems?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule message systems but acts as a compliance control layer above providers to organize, review, and report on messaging outcomes.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule outputs into compliance cases
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes provider messages, exception handling, routing and evidence into one controllable compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
